SAMUserMetadata.description: Smarter API User Manifest - Metadata class.

name.description: The camelCase name of the manifest resource
name.title: Name

description.description: The description for this resource. Be brief. Keep it under 255 characters.
description.title: Description

version.description: The semantic version of the manifest. Example: 0.1.0
version.title: Version

tags.description: The tags of the manifest. Used for generic resource categorization and search. Example: ['tag1', 'tag2']
tags.title: Tags

annotations.description: The manifest annotations. Used for storing arbitrary metadata as key-value pairs. Example: [{'smarter.sh/test-manifest/project-name': 'Scooby dooby do'}]. The key should be a valid url-friendly string. The value accepts multi-line string values (YAML block scalars) and various scalar types including str, int, float, bool, datetime.date, datetime.datetime, decimal.Decimal, uuid.UUID, bytes, list, dict.
annotations.title: Annotations

username.description: User.metadata.username[str]. Required. The Django username of the user.
username.title: Username

SAMUserMetadata.title: SAMUserMetadata

config.description: User.spec.config[object]. The configuration for the User.

firstName.description: User.spec.configuration.firstName[str]. Optional. The first name of the User.
firstName.title: Firstname

lastName.description: User.spec.configuration.lastName[str]. Optional. The last name of the User.
lastName.title: Lastname

email.description: User.spec.configuration.email[str]. The email address of the User.
email.title: Email

isStaff.description: User.spec.configuration.isStaff[bool]. Optional. Designates whether the User has admin permissions.
isStaff.title: Isstaff

isActive.description: User.spec.configuration.isActive[bool]. Designates whether this User should be treated as active.
isActive.title: Isactive

SAMUserStatus.description: Smarter API User Manifest - Status class.

account_number.description: User.status.account_number: The account owner of this User. Read only.
account_number.title: Account Number

username.description: User.status.account_number: The Smarter user who created this User. Read only.
username.title: Username

created.description: User.status.created: The date in which this User was created. Read only.
created.title: Created

modified.description: User.status.modified: The date in which this User was most recently changed. Read only.
modified.title: Modified

SAMUserStatus.title: SAMUserStatus

apiVersion.description: apiVersion[String]: Required. The API version of the AbstractSAMBase.
apiVersion.title: Apiversion

kind.description: kind[String]: Required. The kind of resource described by the manifest.
kind.title: Kind

status.description: User.status[obj]: Optional, Read-only. Stateful status information about the User.
